headline: Crown Castle (CCI) Soars 5.8%: Is Further Upside Left in the Stock?
summary: Crown Castle (CCI) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in FFO estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.

headline: Is Crown Castle (CCI) Offering Value After Rate Concerns And Mixed Valuation Signals?
summary: If you are wondering whether Crown Castle stock is priced attractively today, the key is to look past the headlines and focus on what the valuation signals actually say. The stock last closed at US$93.79, with returns of 3.0% over the past week, 5.3% over the past month and 5.7% year to date, while the return over the past year declined 2.1% and the 5 year return declined 40.7%. Recent market attention on Crown Castle has centred on how investors view large tower and infrastructure REITs...
